name: Thai Beef Grill
recipeIngredient: 2 boneless beef top loin steaks or sirloin steak
1 large sweet onion (such as Vidalia, Walla Walls, Sweet or Maui), cut into 1/2-inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the beef steaks and onion slices with 3 tablespoons of teriyaki sauce, ensuring even coverage on both sides.
2. Place the steaks and onions on the grill over medium, ash-covered coals.
3. Grill the top loin steaks (or sirloin) uncovered for 15 to 18 minutes, or until they reach a medium rare to medium doneness. Turn the steaks occasionally. For top sirloin steak, grill for 17 to 21 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, mix 2 tablespoons of teriyaki sauce, water, and crushed red pepper with a fork until smooth.
5. Trim any excess fat from the beef steaks.
6. Using a sharp knife, slice the steaks crosswise into thick pieces.
7. Serve the sliced steaks with the grilled onions and the peanut sauce.
Makes 4 servings.
